title: TFC: Hammer Time
description: Adds sledgehammers to Terrafirmacraft for faster mining
body:
This addon introduces sledgehammers, a powerful new mining tool for Terrafirmacraft. Designed for efficiency, sledgehammers allow players to mine a 3x3 area with a single swing, making large-scale mining projects faster and more convenient. 

![This picture shows the recipe of the sledgehammer, it requires a hammer head on the top right, a rod in the middle of the same metal, and a stick at the bottom left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28046ba055cb12cd4084f1224943398f3a67f082.png)
With a recipe that requires you first unlock the corresponding anvil, the mod aims at balancing the convenience of the sledgehammers with Terrafirmacraft's design and progression system.

Whether you're building expansive underground bases or simply want to gather resources more efficiently, the sledgehammer is an essential tool for any serious miner. Download now to streamline your resource gathering and enhance your Terrafirmacraft adventure!
